name: cc-instruments
description: cc-instruments — the primitives layer of the cc-* harness: philosophy-agnostic tools you reach for while working, usable in any project or by any layer. Two reasoning side doors — /crux unwinds a pain, doubt, or blockage into ONE diagnosis and angle of attack; /slap resets a fix stuck in a rabbit hole. Three diagramming skills — /likec4 (structured C4 architecture-as-code), /mermaid (portable diagrams that render in GitHub), /excalidraw (freeform hand-drawn sketches). And cctreectl, a .gitignore-aware project-tree helper the script's map-the-codebase stage uses. Zero-config. The harness's own setup lives in cc-config; the product script in cc-script; the musician in cc-musician; the fleet console in cc-conductor.
